volumeHelp: Tobetsa go bona selaete sa bolumu
statusUsingDesc: Go dirisa mofuta o o tlhalosiwang
statusLoadingDesc: Go laisa mofuta o o tlhalosiwang
statusUsingNoDesc: Go dirisa mofuta o o sa tlhalosiwang
statusLoadingNoDesc: Go laisa mofuta o o sa tlhalosiwang
statusLoadingNext: Go laisa pina e e latelang
alertDescribedVersion: Go dirisa mofuta o o tlhalosiwang wa modumo wa bidio eno
alertNonDescribedVersion: Go dirisa mofuta o o sa tlhalosiwang wa bidio eno
fallbackError1: Tshwarelo, sebatli sa gago ga se kgone go tshameka seno
fallbackError2: Dibatli tse di latelang di itsege ka go dira le setshamekisi seno sa media
prefIntroCaptions: Dikgatlhegelo tse di latelang di laola kafa ditlhaloso di bontshiwang ka gone.
prefIntroDescription1: Setshamekisi seno sa media se tshegetsa tlhaloso ya modumo ka ditsela tse pedi:
prefIntroDescription2: Bidio ya ga jaana e na le
prefIntroDescriptionNone: Vidio ya ga jaana ga e na tlhaloso ya modumo mo fomete epe ya tsone.
prefIntroDescription3: Dirisa foromo e e latelang go seta ditlhopho tsa gago tse di amanang le tlhaloso ya modumo o o theilweng mo mafokong.
prefIntroDescription4: Fa o sena go boloka diseting tsa gago, tlhaloso ya modumo e ka tobediwa/tingwa ka go dirisa konopo ya Tlhaloso.
prefIntroKeyboard1: Setshamekisi sa media mo tsebeng eno ya webo se ka dirisiwa go tswa gongwe le gongwe mo tsebeng o dirisa dikgaoganyo tsa khiiboto (bona fa tlase go bona lenaane).
prefIntroKeyboard2: Dikonopo tsa phetolo (Shift, Alt, le Taolo) di ka abelwa fa tlase.
prefIntroKeyboard3: ELA TLHOKO: Dikopano dingwe tsa dinotlolo di ka nna tsa thulana le dinotlolo tse di dirisiwang ke sebatli sa gago le/kgotsa ditiriso tse dingwe tsa serweboleta.
prefIntroTranscript: Dikgatlhego tse di latelang di ama sekwalwa se se dirisanang.
prefCookieWarning: Go boloka dilo tse o di ratang go tlhoka dikhuki.
prefHeadingKeyboard1: Dikonopo tsa sefetoledi tse di dirisediwang dikgaoganyo
prefHeadingKeyboard2: Dikgaoganyo tsa ga jaana tsa khiiboto
prefHeadingTextDescription: Tlhaloso ya modumo o o theilweng mo mafokong
escapeKeyFunction: Tswala puisano ya ga jaana kgotsa menyu o o tlhagelelang
prefDescFormatHelp: Fa difomate tseno ka bobedi di le teng, go tla dirisiwa e le nngwe fela.
prefDescFormatOption1: mofuta o mongwe o o tlhalosiwang wa bidio
prefDescFormatOption1b: mofuta o mongwe o o tlhalosiwang
prefDescFormatOption2: tlhaloso e e theilweng mo mokwalong, e e itsisiweng ke sebuisi sa sekerini
prefDescFormatOption2b: tlhaloso e e theilweng mo sekwalong
prefDescPause: Emisa bidio ka go itirisa fa tlhaloso e simolola
sampleDescriptionText: Fetola diseting gore o utlwe mokwalo ono wa sekao.
prefHighlight: Tlhaola se se kwadilweng fa mmedia o tshameka
prefNoChange: Ga o a dira diphetogo dipe.
windowMoveRight: Lefensetere le sutisitswe ka fa mojeng
windowMoveStopped: Go tsamaya ga fensetere go emisitswe
signControls: Ditaolo tsa Difensetere tsa Puo ya Diatla
windowMoveAlert: Goga kgotsa dirisa dikonopo tsa motsu go sutisa fensetere;
windowSendBackAlert: Jaanong fensetere eno e ka fa morago ga dilo tse dingwe mo tsebeng.
windowBringTopAlert: Jaanong fensetere eno e fa pele ga dilo tse dingwe mo tsebeng.
resultsSummary4: Tobetsa nako e e amanang le ntlha epe fela go tshameka bidio go tswa mo ntlheng eo.
noResultsFound: Ga go na dipholo tse di bonweng.
aboutTitle: Ka ga Motshameki yo o Kgonang
productNameWeb: Motshameki yo o Kgonang TOTHOM Kgatiso ya Webo
productNameWp: Motshameki yo o Kgonang TOTHOM wa WordPress
webEditionDescription: Kgatiso e e rulagantsweng le e e atolositsweng ya sebapadi sa metswedi ya dikgang se se fitlhelesegang sa Able Player.
wpEditionDescription: WordPress plugin e eketsa widget ya Elementor, e etseditsweng ho kopanya kgatiso e hlophisitsweng le e atolositsweng ya sebapadi sa mecha ya ditaba se fihlellwang sa Able Player.
thirdPartyDescription: Sediriswa seno se akaretsa serweboleta se se latelang sa motswedi o o bulegileng:
distributedUnder: E anamisiwa ka fa tlase ga melawana ya
